data.body: WS11 (pot-augur-ogle) LANDED: commit 0b73ea24e. removal-rationale criterion (Chesterton's Fence, AGENT, advisory) + CANONICAL_LLM (36) + docs + eval cases. Completion-verifier failed first on the fabricated-scenario AC (needed structured removal_scenario_grounded assertion) -> added checklist_expect + test assertion, re-closed. 6/11 done (WS1,6,7,2,3,11 = criteria-routing group complete). Stack: WS1->WS6->WS7->WS2->WS3->WS11 (tip 0b73ea24e). Next: WS4 DET verify-command lint (extend p6_ac_quality, DET_CHECKS stays P1-P9).
